creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to bmeyer from comment #6)
Sorry, I didn't notice in my email box.

Thanks for answer.

install -m 0755 rhtv-config /wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/rhtvision/work/stage/usr/local/bin
